scripts.dev:web: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$webPids = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($procId in $webPids) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if (Test-Path '.next/dev/lock') { Remove-Item '.next/dev/lock' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; & node_modules/.bin/next dev --webpack"
scripts.dev:ai: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:HF_HUB_DISABLE_SYMLINKS_WARNING='1'; $env:TRANSFORMERS_NO_ADVISORY_WARNINGS='1'; $env:ENABLE_FASHIONCLIP='1'; $env:REQUIRE_PRETRAINED='0'; $env:KMP_DUPLICATE_LIB_OK='TRUE'; $stale = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter \"name = 'python.exe'\" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '*uvicorn app.main:app*' -or $_.CommandLine -like '*ai-service*uvicorn*' } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty ProcessId -Unique; foreach ($procId in $stale) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; $existing = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8010 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($procId in $existing) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if (!(Test-Path 'ai-service/.venv/Scripts/python.exe')) { python -m venv ai-service/.venv; & ai-service/.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pip install -r ai-service/requirements.txt }; & ai-service/.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8010 --app-dir ai-service"
scripts.ai:install: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:HF_HUB_DISABLE_SYMLINKS_WARNING='1'; if (!(Test-Path 'ai-service/.venv/Scripts/python.exe')) { python -m venv ai-service/.venv }; & ai-service/.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pip install -r ai-service/requirements.txt"
